# primary

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/primary"
```

Package primary implements Primary Directions, the oldest predictive technique in Western astrology. Primary Directions use the diurnal rotation of the Earth \(primary motion\) to advance chart points, measuring the equatorial arc between a promissor and a significator.

CalcPrimaryDirections computes all primary direction hits within a given age range for the supplied natal chart data, using the Ptolemy semi\-arc method and the Naibod rate key \(0.98556 degrees per year\) by default.

## Constants

<a name="NaibodRate"></a>NaibodRate is the Naibod key in degrees per year: 360 / 365.25 ≈ 0.98556.

```go
const NaibodRate = 0.98556
```

<a name="DirectionKey"></a>
## type [DirectionKey](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/primary/primary.go#L12>)

DirectionKey selects the rate at which the arc of direction converts to years.

```go
type DirectionKey string
```

<a name="KeyNaibod"></a>

```go
const (
    KeyNaibod   DirectionKey = "NAIBOD"    // 0.98556 deg/year (Sun's mean daily motion)
    KeyPtolemy  DirectionKey = "PTOLEMY"   // Same as Naibod (classical)
    KeySolarArc DirectionKey = "SOLAR_ARC" // Actual Sun's yearly motion at birth
)
```

<a name="DirectionType"></a>
## type [DirectionType](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/primary/primary.go#L21>)

DirectionType distinguishes direct \(zodiacal\) from converse directions.

```go
type DirectionType string
```

<a name="DirectDirect"></a>

```go
const (
    DirectDirect   DirectionType = "DIRECT"   // In order of signs (zodiacal)
    DirectConverse DirectionType = "CONVERSE" // Against order of signs
)
```

<a name="PrimaryDirection"></a>
## type [PrimaryDirection](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/primary/primary.go#L32-L40>)

PrimaryDirection represents a single primary direction hit.

```go
type PrimaryDirection struct {
    Promissor    string            `json:"promissor"`
    Significator string            `json:"significator"`
    AspectType   models.AspectType `json:"aspect_type"`
    Arc          float64           `json:"arc"`
    AgeExact     float64           `json:"age_exact"`
    Direction    DirectionType     `json:"direction"`
    Key          DirectionKey      `json:"direction_key"`
}
```

<a name="PrimaryDirectionInput"></a>
## type [PrimaryDirectionInput](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/primary/primary.go#L43-L52>)

PrimaryDirectionInput holds the parameters for a primary direction calculation.

```go
type PrimaryDirectionInput struct {
    NatalJD     float64
    GeoLat      float64
    GeoLon      float64
    Planets     []models.PlanetID
    Aspects     []models.AspectType
    Key         DirectionKey
    MaxAge      float64
    HouseSystem models.HouseSystem
}
```

<a name="PrimaryDirectionResult"></a>
## type [PrimaryDirectionResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/primary/primary.go#L55-L57>)

PrimaryDirectionResult holds the computed primary directions.

```go
type PrimaryDirectionResult struct {
    Directions []PrimaryDirection `json:"directions"`
}
```

<a name="CalcPrimaryDirections"></a>
### func [CalcPrimaryDirections](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/primary/primary.go#L160>)

```go
func CalcPrimaryDirections(input PrimaryDirectionInput) (*PrimaryDirectionResult, error)
```

CalcPrimaryDirections computes primary direction hits for all promissor\-significator\-aspect combinations within the configured age range.
